item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-21 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills (+6158 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0 Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +6158，总 stars 17,293，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] koala73/worldmonitor (+402 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI DevTool / Observability Description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface Why it matters: AI DevTool / Observability 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +402，总 stars 57,767，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] chopratejas/headroom (+3874 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +3874，总 stars 43,034，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1258 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents zero-config access to read and search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — all free, no API fees. Why it matters: The repo exploded from 31,787 stars with a 24h delta of +2,809 and a 7-day delta of +7,284. The acceleration ratio is 3.3 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is a massive spike in attention, likely driven by viral sharing in AI developer communities. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'capability layers' that abstract away the complexity of platform-specific access. Instead of each agent reinventing the wheel for web scraping, a shared open-source layer can handle authentication, backend selection, and fallback routing. This pattern may become standard for agent infrastructure. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp (+1436 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1436，总 stars 9,851，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis (+733 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +733，前 3 日均值 127.7，加速度 5.7x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] topoteretes/cognee (+517 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +517，前 3 日均值 33.7，加速度 15.4x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
